quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.CfnAb:
An insight visual.

For more information, see [Working with insights](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/computational-insights.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.Actio.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.DataS.Description: The dataset that is used in the insight visual.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.Insig.Description: The configuration of an insight visual.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.Subti.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.dashboard.insightvisual.Visua.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
